event: Girl Adorning a Wayside Shrine of the Virgin Mary with a Rose
symbols: rose placed at the shrine — love and devotion offered to the Virgin Mary
wayside shrine — popular piety and the sanctification of everyday life
mountain landscape — the grandeur of creation as backdrop to simple faith
girl’s humble clothing — the piety of the poor and young
description: A young blonde girl in a white blouse and red skirt reaches up to place a rose at a small stone wayside shrine containing a statue or image of the Virgin Mary. The shrine is built from rough stone with a small sheltered niche. Behind the girl, a lush green Alpine landscape stretches into the distance with mountains, trees, and a valley. A colorful bundle sits on the ground beside her. The light is warm and natural.

_meta.title: Girl adorns the Virgin Mary with a rose
